# DeviceLocationCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to request the location of a device when in Lost Mode.

## Declaration

```swift
object DeviceLocationCommand
```

## Objects

- **DeviceLocationCommand.Command**: The command to request the location of a device when in Lost Mode.

## Commands and responses

- **DeviceLocationResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to request the location of a device when in Lost Mode.
